_comment: Curated Melaka issues, compiled Jul 2026 from news research (the Melaka dossier round). Verdict REPORTED = sourced from named news reporting but NOT yet through the full adversarial fact-check the Johor CONFIRMED entries received — re-verify each before printing campaign material. Every entry must keep at least one working source URL. Seat keys use the current Melaka DUN codes.

N.24.issue_bm: ADUN Bemban dipecat daripada Bersatu dan kini duduk sebagai Bebas — gabungan yang memenangi kerusi ini pada 2021 sudah tidak wujud di sini
N.24.issue_en: Bemban's assemblyman was expelled from Bersatu and now sits as an Independent — the coalition that won this seat in 2021 no longer exists here
N.24.receipt_bm: Dilaporkan Bernama/FMT (2025); majoriti 2021 hanya 328 undi dalam pertandingan tiga penjuru.
N.24.receipt_en: Reported by Bernama/FMT (2025); the 2021 majority was just 328 votes in a three-way fight.

N.24.issue_bm: 26 daripada 106 lokasi berisiko banjir di Melaka berada di daerah Jasin — banjir Okt 2025 sekali lagi memindahkan keluarga di sini
N.24.issue_en: 26 of Melaka's 106 flood-risk locations are in Jasin district — the Oct 2025 floods displaced families here again
N.24.receipt_bm: Angka MTL/Bomba Melaka (Nov 2025) melalui Majlis Keselamatan Negara.
N.24.receipt_en: MTL/Melaka Fire Dept figures (Nov 2025) via the National Security Council.

N.15.issue_bm: Pengundi Pengkalan Batu pernah melalui episod lompat parti: ADUN yang menang 2018 keluar parti pada 2020, bertanding semula sebagai Bebas dan tewas teruk — majoriti 2021 hanya 131 undi, paling tipis di Melaka
N.15.issue_en: Pengkalan Batu lived through the defection saga first-hand: its 2018 winner left his party in 2020, ran again as an independent and was crushed — the 2021 majority here was 131 votes, the state's thinnest
N.15.receipt_bm: Keputusan rasmi 2021; kronologi peralihan dilaporkan meluas.
N.15.receipt_en: Official 2021 results; the defection chronology is widely reported.

N.13.issue_bm: Paya Rumput ialah kawasan keluarga muda yang berkembang pesat — projek perumahan rakyat PRR bernilai RM80 juta sedang dibina, tanda permintaan rumah mampu milik yang tinggi
N.13.issue_en: Paya Rumput is a fast-growing young-family belt — an RM80m PRR public-housing project is under construction, a marker of high affordable-housing demand

N.14.issue_bm: Projek penambakan M-WEZ bernilai RM600 juta di pesisir Klebang berdepan bantahan nelayan yang kehilangan kawasan tangkapan
N.14.issue_en: The RM600m M-WEZ waterfront reclamation off Klebang faces pushback from fishermen losing their fishing grounds
N.14.receipt_bm: JV RM600j dilaporkan Business Today (Okt 2025); kesan ekologi dan nelayan didokumentasi Macaranga.
N.14.receipt_en: The RM600m JV reported by Business Today (Oct 2025); ecological and fishermen impacts documented by Macaranga.

N.21.issue_bm: Duyong menyaksikan pergelutan terbuka BN–DAP tentang siapa patut bertanding di sini — sementara isu penduduk terbiar di tepi
N.21.issue_en: Duyong is watching an open BN–DAP tussle over who gets to contest the seat — while residents' issues sit on the sidelines
N.21.receipt_bm: Dilaporkan Malaysia Gazette (Jul 2025); majoriti 2021 hanya 200 undi.
N.21.receipt_en: Reported by Malaysia Gazette (Jul 2025); the 2021 majority was just 200 votes.

statewide.issue_bm: Luka politik Melaka masih terbuka: kerajaan negeri tumbang pada Okt 2021 selepas empat ADUN menarik sokongan, memaksa pilihan raya pertengahan penggal — episod kedua selepas kerajaan 2018 turut tumbang melalui peralihan sokongan pada 2020
statewide.issue_en: Melaka's political wound is still open: the state government collapsed in Oct 2021 after four assemblymen withdrew support, forcing a mid-term election — the second collapse after the 2018 government also fell through defections in 2020
statewide.receipt_bm: Kronologi 2020–2021 didokumentasi meluas; PRN Nov 2021 diadakan akibat kehilangan majoriti.
statewide.receipt_en: The 2020–2021 chronology is widely documented; the Nov 2021 snap election followed the loss of majority.

statewide.issue_bm: 106 lokasi di seluruh Melaka dikenal pasti berisiko banjir (MTL/Bomba, Nov 2025); banjir Mac dan Okt 2025 memindahkan penduduk termasuk di Taman Rambai Jaya
statewide.issue_en: 106 locations across Melaka are identified as flood-risk (MTL/Fire Dept, Nov 2025); the March and Oct 2025 floods displaced residents including in Taman Rambai Jaya
